title: Standardize Date Format by Removing Time Component from Last Viewed Date
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want all date columns (Created, Last Modified, Last Viewed) to use the same simple date format without time, so the table is clean and consistent.
description: The Last Viewed Date was formatted differently from Created Date and Last Modified Date (it included a time component). Updated all three date columns to use the same simple date-only format for consistency.
acceptance_criteria: All three date columns use identical date-only format
Time component is removed from Last Viewed Date
ux_changes: Removed time component from Last Viewed Date; all three date columns now use identical simple date format.
implementation_notes: Updated moment.js format strings to use date-only format consistently across all three date columns.
comment_summary: Waqar standardized all three date formats and deployed to development for review.
